channel.title: Dark-History on Grim Chronicle
channel.description: Recent content in Dark-History on Grim Chronicle

item.title: Chernobyl: The Night the Soviet Union Lied to the World
item.description: On April 26, 1986, reactor number four at the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant exploded. What followed was not just a nuclear disaster — it was one of the most catastrophic cover-ups in modern history.

item.title: Enron: How the Biggest Corporate Fraud in History Was Hidden in Plain Sight
item.description: Enron was once the seventh largest company in America. Then it collapsed overnight, wiping out billions in savings and exposing one of the most audacious financial frauds ever committed. This is the full story.
